description: Download a remote archive (zip / tar / tar.gz / tar.bz2 / tar.xz / gz / bz2), extract it, and emit a {filename: absolute_path_or_uri} dict for downstream consumption. Supports local paths and remote URIs (s3://, gs://, abfss://, az://) via fsspec.

url.label: URL
url.description: URL of the archive to download (http / https / ftp)

extract_to.label: Extract To
extract_to.description: Destination directory. Local (/tmp/foo, file:///tmp/foo) or remote URI (s3://bucket/prefix/, gs://bucket/prefix/, abfss://container@account.dfs.core.windows.net/prefix/, abfs://..., az://container/prefix/). For remote, archive is extracted to a local temp dir then uploaded via fsspec. Default: /tmp/<asset_name>/

archive_type.label: Archive Type
archive_type.description: Override for archive format. Auto-detected from URL extension if omitted.

flatten.label: Flatten
flatten.description: If all entries share a single top-level directory, strip it (matches the common `unzip` mental model)

include_glob.label: Include Glob
include_glob.description: List of fnmatch patterns (e.g. ["*.csv", "*.tsv"]) restricting which files appear in the output dict. Everything still extracts to disk; only the dict + uploads (for remote destinations) are filtered.

timeout.label: Timeout
timeout.description: HTTP timeout in seconds for the download

verify_ssl.label: Verify SSL
verify_ssl.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates on the download

headers.label: Headers
headers.description: Optional HTTP headers for the download — YAML dict or JSON string. Useful for Authorization, User-Agent, etc.

cleanup_archive.label: Cleanup Archive
cleanup_archive.description: If true, delete the downloaded archive after extraction
